response: Start by reading food labels to find hidden sugars in your [grocery list]. Swap refined carbs for whole grains to stabilize your blood sugar levels. Drink water or herbal tea instead of sugary sodas and juices. Replace dessert with fresh fruit or a small handful of nuts. Plan your meals ahead of time to avoid impulsive snacking at [location]. Gradually reduce added sugar to let your taste buds adjust over time. Consult a nutritionist for a personalized plan that fits your lifestyle.
